name: Image Workflow

releases.author: 1spread
releases.description: Fix plugin directory metadata warnings by releasing a manifest description without the reserved product name and with terminal punctuation.

releases.author: 1spread
releases.description:
Initial public release.

## Highlights
- Click any image in a note to open a fullscreen overlay with zoom, copy, download, and copy-path
- Cmd/Ctrl+C on a markdown selection containing image embeds (`![[...]]` or `![](...)`) writes a rich-text version with images embedded as base64 data URLs — paste into Gmail / Google Docs / Slack and images appear inline
- Smart paste-back: pasting that rich clipboard into another Obsidian note inserts the original markdown, not base64
- Command "Copy selection as HTML with embedded images" — bind a hotkey (e.g. Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+C) to render the selection through Obsidian's full Markdown renderer and write rich HTML, with Mermaid diagrams and MathJax equations rasterized to PNG
- Settings tab with toggle to disable Cmd/Ctrl+C interception if you prefer Obsidian's default copy

Desktop only. Requires Obsidian ≥ 1.4.0.

releases.author: 1spread
releases.description:
## Image Enlarge v1.0.0

Click any image in Obsidian to open a fullscreen overlay with zoom and clipboard copy.

### Features
- Click image to open fullscreen overlay
- Mouse wheel zoom (snaps to 1:1 at 100%)
- `Cmd+C` — copy image to clipboard
- `Cmd+Shift+C` — copy vault-relative path
- `Escape` or click background to close

### Install via BRAT
1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) from Community Plugins
2. BRAT settings → "Add Beta plugin"
3. Enter: `1spread/obsidian-image-enlarge`
releases.name: v1.0.0 — Initial release
